accept.reason: pack check modules deliberately share the checks/ engine lib — a named cross-cutting concern per skills/file-placement/SKILL.md; packs are organized by pack, not by dependency

a skill's test-the-world check module deliberately shares the checks/ engine lib (findings.mjs) — the same cross-cutting concern as the packs/ acceptance; the check is co-located with the skill whose action it validates, not organized by dependency

the promote phase's diff-scope gate deliberately reuses the checks/ engine lib (context.mjs diff-scoping, findings.mjs) — the same cross-cutting concern as the packs/ and skills/ acceptances; it is co-located with growth/promote.md whose write surface it certifies, and reusing the engine's merge-base logic beats duplicating it

the core planner deliberately imports the pack-discovery registry (packs/registry.mjs — core machinery per extending.md, not a specific pack) to enumerate each repo's run_daily tasks; discovery lives under packs/ and the planner under routines/, so the cross-tree reach is inherent and correct, not a misplacement

the migrations-owned fleet apply pass deliberately reuses the shared cross-repo GitHub primitives in routines/fleet/fleet-api.mjs (makeGh/paged/isCovered — core machinery, the same the planner and census use); migrations/ and routines/fleet/ are separate top-level concerns sharing the fleet API, so the reach is inherent, not a misplacement

the migrations-owned fleet retire pass deliberately reuses the shared cross-repo GitHub primitives in routines/fleet/fleet-api.mjs (makeGh/paged/fileExists/isCovered — core machinery, the same the planner and census use); migrations/ and routines/fleet/ are separate top-level concerns sharing the fleet API, so the reach is inherent, not a misplacement
